narrative:
Deercreek Township has 601 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.3 percentage points.
